/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -T/home/marcel/src/rotor-controller/controller/src/tm4c123.ld -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-Map=/home/marcel/src/rotor-controller/controller/build/rotor-controller.map --specs=nosys.specs --specs=nano.specs "CMakeFiles/rotor-controller.elf.dir/src/startup_gcc.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/rotor-controller.elf.dir/src/main.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/rotor-controller.elf.dir/src/tick.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/rotor-controller.elf.dir/src/adc.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/rotor-controller.elf.dir/src/gpio_outputs.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/rotor-controller.elf.dir/src/state_machine.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/rotor-controller.elf.dir/src/net.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/rotor-controller.elf.dir/src/protocol.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/rotor-controller.elf.dir/lib/tivaware/utils/uartstdio.c.obj" -o rotor-controller.elf  libdriverlib.a libwiznet.a -lm
